description: A dropdown menu, triggered by an application-defined trigger.

props.name: children
props.description: Children to be rendered (should be of type Menu.Item, Menu.Section, or Menu.Separator).

props.name: maxHeightClassName
props.description: Optional classes to customize max height (used with overflow: auto/scroll)

props.name: menuClassName
props.description: Optional classes to append to the menu list

props.name: overflow
props.description: Optional overflow behavior for long menus

props.name: popoverClassName
props.description: Optional classes to append to the popover wrapper

props.name: trigger
props.description: The trigger to open/close this menu

props.name: children
props.description: Children that represent this Item

props.name: className
props.description: CSS classes to append for this Item

props.name: children
props.description: Children that represent this Section

props.name: className
props.description: CSS classes to append for this Section

props.name: heading
props.description: Heading content displayed for this Section

props.name: headingClassName
props.description: CSS classes to append for this Section heading

props.name: className
props.description: CSS classes to append for this Separator

props.name: children
props.description: Children rendered in this submenu

props.name: className
props.description: CSS classes to append to the trigger item row

props.name: isDisabled
props.description: Should this submenu be disabled?

props.name: label
props.description: Label content displayed in this submenu trigger

props.name: maxHeightClassName
props.description: Optional classes to customize submenu max height

props.name: menuClassName
props.description: Optional classes to append to the submenu list

props.name: overflow
props.description: Optional overflow behavior for long submenu lists

props.name: popoverClassName
props.description: Optional classes to append to the submenu popover wrapper

props.name: textValue
props.description: Plain-text value for type-ahead search on the submenu trigger
